Title: Full Stack Developer
Job Desc:
Full Stack Developer (REMOTE)

Role Summary

We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Full Stack Developer to play a key role in the design, delivery, and ongoing evolution of our integration and data platform, supporting multiple critical operational systems across the business.

The role combines hands-on technical delivery with responsibility for technical design, solution quality, and the establishment of clear engineering standards. The successful candidate will be a trusted senior engineer who can advise on technical implementation options, make sound design decisions, and ensure systems are built in a maintainable, reliable, and scalable way.

Business priorities and functional requirements are defined through a business-led, agile delivery model. The focus of this role is on how those requirements are implemented technically, ensuring the platform remains robust, coherent, and fit for purpose as it grows.

Key Responsibilities

  • Technical Delivery & Ownership
  • Own the technical implementation and support of existing integrations and data services
  • Build, maintain, and extend API-based and event-driven integrations from defined requirements
  • Translate approved functional and data specifications into robust technical designs and implementations
  • Improve data consistency, validation, reliability, and traceability across systems
  • Diagnose and resolve integration failures, performance issues, and data defects
  • Ensure solutions are secure, monitored, and production-ready

  • Technical Design & Solution Advisory
  • Provide technical input and solution options during design and planning discussions
  • Advise on implementation approaches, trade-offs, and constraints
  • Make pragmatic decisions on build vs extend vs reuse within the existing landscape
  • Ensure solutions align with operational priorities and scale appropriately
  • Maintain a strong focus on simplicity, maintainability, and long-term supportability
  • Standards, Patterns & Documentation
  • Define, document, and maintain technical standards, including:
  • Integration patterns
  • API design conventions
  • Data handling and validation approaches
  • Error handling, logging, and monitoring
  • Establish baseline engineering practices appropriate for a growing organization
  • Produce and maintain clear technical documentation for:
  • Systems and integrations
  • Data flows and dependencies
  • Key technical decisions
  • Reduce dependency on individuals by improving clarity, consistency, and repeatability

Agile Delivery

  • Deliver work within an agile framework, working iteratively from prioritized backlogs
  • Contribute to backlog refinement, sprint planning, and incremental delivery
  • Apply agile principles pragmatically, with a focus on outcomes over ceremony

Working Model

  • Offshore delivery with structured overlap with UK business hours

Title: Full Stack Developer - React
Job Desc:
React Developer

Position Overview

We are seeking an experienced React Developer with 45+ years of professional experience in building scalable web applications. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in modern front-end technologies and frameworks, with an added advantage if they have worked on offline data management, performance-focused UX/UI, and healthcare-related applications. We are seeking a skilled Full Stack Developer with expertise in React for front-end development, proficiency in building middleware using C# .NET Core, and a strong understanding of database design and management.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain high-quality, scalable, and reusable React components.
  • Collaborate with designers, product managers, and backend developers to deliver seamless user experiences.
  • Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
  • Implement the middleware in C# .net core.
  • Write the backend queries and stored procedures.
  • Implement state management solutions (Redux, Context API, or similar).
  • Ensure cross-browser compatibility and responsive design.
  • Integrate RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints.
  • Write clean, maintainable, and testable code following industry best practices.
  • Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing applications.
  • Participate in code reviews and mentor junior developers.
  • Stay updated with emerging front-end technologies and frameworks.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
  • 4-5+ years of professional experience in front-end development.
  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, and TypeScript.
  • Experience with HTML5, CSS3, and modern styling frameworks (Sass, Styled Components, Tailwind).
  • We are seeking a Full Stack Developer with strong expertise in .NET Core and proficiency in developing middleware using C#.
  • The ideal candidate should also possess in-depth knowledge of database structures, including designing and managing tables, writing complex queries, and creating efficient stored procedures.
  • Familiarity with Webpack, Babel, and other build tools.
  • Knowledge of offline data management techniques (local storage, IndexedDB, caching strategies).
  • Experience in building fast, responsive, and intuitive UI/UX.
  • Advantage: Exposure to healthcare applications and compliance standards (HIPAA, HL7, FHIR).
  • Strong problem-solving and communication skills.

Title: Full Stack Developer
Job Desc:
Position Overview
We re seeking an experienced Senior Full-Stack Developer. You ll work with a talented team based in India to develop a scalable, robust platform that leverages AI/ML technologies including LLMs to deliver industry-specific SEO insights and implementation guidance.
Key Responsibilities
  • Architecture Implementation: Implement scalable system architecture for web crawling, data analysis, and user interfaces
  • Full-Stack Development: Build robust backend services and responsive frontend components
  • AI Integration: Implement LLM integration using OpenRouter to power implementation guidance and task creation
  • Database Design: Design and optimize PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases for SEO data
  • Code Quality: Follow established coding standards and ensure technical excellence
  • Team Collaboration: Work closely with backend developers, frontend developers, DevOps, and UX designers
  • Agile Process: Participate in sprint planning, daily standups, and retrospectives
Required Qualifications
  • 3+ years of full-stack development experience
  • Strong proficiency in Node.js and Express.js backend development
  • Expert knowledge of React.js and frontend technologies
  • Experience with PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases
  • Familiarity with AWS cloud services
  • Understanding of microservices architecture
  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
  • Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced startup environment
Preferred Qualifications
  • Experience with web crawling technologies (Puppeteer/Playwright)
  • Knowledge of SEO principles and technical SEO
  • Experience integrating with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI)
  • Familiarity with Redis for caching and queue management
  • Experience with containerization (Docker)
  • Background in building SaaS products
Technical Skills
  • Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Redux, Material-UI, Tailwind CSS
  • Backend: Node.js, Express.js, GraphQL
  • Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
  • Cloud: AWS (EC2, ECS, S3, CloudFront)
  • DevOps: Docker, GitHub Actions, AWS CloudWatch
  • API Integration: RESTful APIs, OpenRouter/OpenAI
  • Testing: Jest, Cypress
What We Offer
  • Opportunity to shape a cutting-edge product from the ground up
  • Competitive salary and benefits
  • Work from home opportunity
  • Exposure to advanced AI/ML technologies
  • Clear path for career growth as the company expands
  • Collaborative and innovative team culture
